chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD CP No. S- 1202 of 2015 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 25.01.2016 1. For Orders on Office Objection 2. For Katcha Peshi Mr. Francis Khokhar, Advocate for petitioners Mr. Muhammad Ali Rind, Advocate for respondents Ch. Bashir Ahmed Asstt. A.G. a/w ASI Muhammad Siddiqi PS Badin Petitioners are aggrieved by the harassment allegedly caused to them by the private respondents. Mr. Muhammad Ali Rind, Advocate has filed power on behalf of private respondents and has denied the allegations. He further states that there is FIR registered against the petitioners. Learned A.A.G. states that no harassment has been caused to the petitioners by the official respondents. Learned counsel for petitioners states that in so far as the FIR is concenred, he would be filing a proper application for its quashment. As the respondents have stated before this court that neither harassment has been caused to the petitioners nor they intend to do so in future. This statement has satisfied the counsel for petitioner who seeks disposal of this petition in the above terms. Let the official respondents shall provide necessary protection according to law to the petitioners. This petition is disposed of accordingly. JUDGE *Karar/-
